title: Old Illager Statue
description: Adds an Old Illager Statue to the plains and forest biomes
body:
This mod adds ancient, overgrown Illager Statues to the Plains and Forest biomes.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77dc57d86b6b03b60931ba41920b5135924c6255.jpeg)

Hidden Treasure: Somewhere inside the statue, secret loot can be found.

Landmark: The statues also serve as unique structures to discover and decorate your world.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88ed68d3bdba06cfbf9a8068446c69b38da8f6d3.jpeg)


**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks**
